   +-----------------+   
   |    Customer     |   
   +-----------------+   
   | [Person]        |   
   | A bank customer |   
   +-----------------+   
            |            
            | Uses       
            v            
.- Big Bank ------------.
| +------------------+  |
| | Internet Banking |  |
| +------------------+  |
| | [System]         |  |
| | Web app          |  |
| +------------------+  |
|           |           |
|           | Sends     |
|           v           |
| +-------------------+ |
| |      E-mail       | |
| +-------------------+ |
| | [External System] | |
| | MS Exchange       | |
| +-------------------+ |
'-----------------------'
